description: Send notifications to your own Office 365 destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise azure:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-office365_email

request.template: {"urls":"azure://${ customer_secrets.OFFICE365_EMAIL_SOURCE }/${ customer_secrets.OFFICE365_EMAIL_TENANT }/${ customer_secrets.OFFICE365_EMAIL_CLIENT_ID }/${ customer_secrets.OFFICE365_EMAIL_SECRET }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"azure://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.source_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.tenant_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
